content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Pharma (+2.35%), Metal (+1.81%), Realty (+1.87%), IT (+1.77%), and Energy (+1.36%) leading. VIX down -5.73% indicates risk-on mood. Nifty +0.58% pushing toward 24,100 resistance. Book is +0.37% on the day with 54% deployed - good participation but need to manage existing positions before adding more cluster risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.47,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1% with strong Q4 results (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). Current SL at 1035.47 is already tight (~0.7% below CMP 1043). Stock has retreated from intraday high 1060 to 1041 - some profit-taking. SL is already at breakeven-plus protecting the gain. Holding existing SL/target as no-op MODIFY would be wasted - emitting HOLD via position_actions instead. Correction: keep as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 results (PAT +27%, GNPA 1.45%, CASA 52.51%) intact. Stock at 79.36, SL at 77.50 (~2.3% below). PSU bank sector underperforming today (+0.23%) but thesis intact. Holding with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1% breaking out to new 52-week high (411.80 vs prior high 407.25). Per trailing SL mandate (>=+2%), trailing SL up from entry 404.50 to 406 to lock in small gain while giving room for momentum continuation. Energy/power theme strong, MSCI ESG upgrade supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.2% with SL at 694.48 already very close to CMP 696.90 (~0.2% buffer). SL is essentially at breakeven-plus already. Q4 results on Apr 29 (2 days) is binary event - keeping tight SL appropriate. Shooting star pattern on Apr 22 + Form 483 overhang argue against loosening."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3% essentially flat. Q4 turn to profit positive but GNPA 3.43% remains concern. Current SL 850 (~3.5% below) appropriate for higher-volatility name. Not yet at +2% threshold to trail. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1% at fresh 52-week high 1430.90. SL at 1418 already tight (~0.5% below CMP) given strong Q4 (PAT +27%, double-digit volume growth). SL already protecting gains aggressively - not at +2% to warrant further trailing. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2% with Q4 results due Apr 30 (binary event, 3 days). SL at 2260 (~3.7% below CMP 2348) gives room through results. FMCG sector showing breadth, accumulation signals on volume/OI. Holding through event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5% essentially flat. Defensive hedge intact - gold at record highs, geopolitical premium continuing. SL at 119 (~4.5% below) appropriate for ETF. Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 150,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 320.50,
      "stop_loss": 312.00,
      "target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Transmission play - lower volatility within power cluster than NTPC. Near 52-week high (322.15 vs 323.05), strong analyst recommendation, MACD bullish. Q3 PAT +8.4%, regulated returns, ~5% dividend yield support. Cluster check: NTPC already held; adding POWERGRID makes 2 power names ~7% combined (~5% existing NTPC + ~5% new) - within cluster discipline. Position size: 150 x 320.50 = 48,075 (~4.8% of capital). Risk: SL distance 2.65% x position 4.8% = 0.13% portfolio risk - within budget. R:R = (335-320.50)/(320.50-312) = 14.5/8.5 = 1.7:1. Avoiding TATAPOWER pending order to limit cluster risk - will let that pending order ride."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cancelling pending TATAPOWER BUY @ 443 (placed 387m ago, unfilled). Adding POWERGRID instead as transmission play is lower-risk within power cluster. Stacking TATAPOWER + NTPC + POWERGRID would breach cluster discipline. Choosing one cluster representative."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing pending BUY @ 612 still OPEN. Stock rallying with metals theme (+4.6%). Letting limit order ride - if it fills on a pullback, fine; if not, we don't chase. Per order hygiene, not stacking another order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 thesis intact, SL at 77.50 appropriate. PSU bank sector lagging today but no thesis break."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1035.47 already locks in ~5% gain on 6% unrealized. Tight enough; let target 1100 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL at 119 fine for ETF. Gold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already tight at -0.5% from CMP 1429. Aggressive enough."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 694.48 essentially at breakeven-plus. Q4 results Apr 29 binary - tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-Q4 (Apr 30) positioning. SL 2260 gives event room. Accumulation signals constructive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1% at fresh 52-week high. Trailing SL from 404.50 entry to 406 to lock small gain per trailing mandate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat. SL 850 appropriate for high-vol name. Not at +2% threshold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA, TORNTPOWER, JSWSTEEL, SAIL: All up sharply but breakouts to 52-week highs in already-crowded clusters (pharma/power/metals) - cluster discipline prevents stacking. JSWSTEEL has Q4 results Apr 29 (2 days) - event risk caps entry. ALKEM lagging pharma rally (-2.5% intraday from open) - red flag. AXISBANK weak post-Q4 (-3.67%) - no support yet, wait. PHARMABEES could be cleaner pharma play if individual names rally further, but current positions already pharma-exposed via GRANULES. UTIAMC, ANANTRAJ, HSCL, PVRINOX: not adding mid-cap noise without stronger setups.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 54% deployed, 8 holdings. Adding POWERGRID brings to ~59% deployed - still under 60% hysteresis threshold. Cancelling TATAPOWER pending order to manage cluster risk - choosing POWERGRID as the lower-vol cluster expression. Cumulative P&L +0.52% on day 8/180 - on pace, no need to force trades. Key event risk this week: GRANULES Q4 (Apr 29), JSWSTEEL Q4 (Apr 29), HUL Q4 (Apr 30), NESTLEIND already reported. Will reassess GRANULES/HUL position management closer to events."
}
